# awscc_cleanroomsml_configured_model_algorithm (Data Source)

Data Source schema for AWS::CleanRoomsML::ConfiguredModelAlgorithm



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.

### Read-Only

- `configured_model_algorithm_arn` (String)
- `description` (String)
- `inference_container_config` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--inference_container_config))
- `kms_key_arn` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `role_arn` (String)
- `tags` (Attributes Set) An arbitrary set of tags (key-value pairs) for this cleanrooms-ml configured model algorithm. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tags))
- `training_container_config` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--training_container_config))

Read-Only:

- `image_uri` (String)

Read-Only:

- `key` (String)
- `value` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--training_container_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `training_container_config`

Read-Only:

- `arguments` (List of String)
- `entrypoint` (List of String)
- `image_uri` (String)
